text: So, I was trying to find the info on your site, but it’s kind of scattered. Do you guys have like a FAQ section or something? Also, why are some topics in bold and others not? Just curious.
Hey, I saw some info about your new features, but I'm confused. Are they included in my current plan or not?
I ordered a set of speakers but only received one! This is so frustrating, I just need a refund for the missing piece.

I ordered a pair of shoes two weeks ago and they still haven’t arrived. I’ve checked the tracking and it seems to be stuck somewhere. I really expected them to be here by now, especially since the website said they would be delivered in just a few days! What’s going on?
I need a refund for my order. It came broken.

I can’t believe this happened! I bought this product hoping it would work, but it’s just not what I expected. I feel like I deserve my money back after all this frustration. Why can’t I just get a refund instead of another similar item that I won’t even like? It’s been so stressful dealing with this situation; I really just want my money returned without all the hassle. Can you please make that happen?
I was charged for my subscription twice this month, but I only want a refund for one of them.
I was charged for a subscription I didn’t intend to buy; can you help me get a refund?
So, like, my app crashes but only sometimes? It's all confusing. I mean, it works sometimes, but not when I need it. What's up with that? Had it for only a month.

I'm so confused right now. I thought my subscription had the option for a monthly payment, but now it only shows yearly options? Can someone explain why this happened, because I'm really not sure what to do next! Is there a way to change it back? It doesn’t feel fair.
I'm really concerned because I can't seem to find any information about the new features that were promised. Can someone please explain what's going on?
Can't access my profile. It just keeps loading. Not sure what to do next.

I've been using your service for so long, and I can't believe the issues I'm facing now. It's frustrating because I was always satisfied before. This isn't the standard I expected, and I'm unsure if I want to continue my subscription if this keeps happening.
I am unable to update the phone number associated with my account as the edit option appears to be disabled. Could you please assist me in resolving this issue?
My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it! It's really frustrating because I need it for work. Can someone please help me fix this?
I received the wrong item, but returning it seems pointless since I never wanted the alternative in the first place. Totally unhelpful.
